resources.string: No conversations yet - tap + to start
Type a message to start the conversation
Delete conversation \"%1$s\"? This cannot be undone.
You\'ll need to enter it again to keep chatting with AI.
The API key was rejected by OpenAI.
Rate limit exceeded, try again shortly.
The file is too large (limit ~30,000 characters). Trim it or send a fragment.
The PDF is too large (limit 5 MB).
GPT-5.6 Luna - better quality ($1.00 / $6.00 per 1M tokens)
Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite - cheapest ($0.25 / $1.50 per 1M tokens, free tier eligible)

A key from a Google Cloud project without billing uses the free tier: Flash models are free within daily limits, but Google may use conversation content for training. A key with billing enabled is paid and excluded from training.
Gemini 3 Flash - balanced ($0.50 / $3.00 per 1M tokens, free tier eligible)
Gemini 3.5 Flash - better quality ($1.50 / $9.00 per 1M tokens)
Claude Sonnet 5 - better quality ($2.00 / $10.00 per 1M tokens until Aug 2026, then $3.00 / $15.00)
No app found to handle this action.
Couldn\'t read the action details. Please try again.
Delete %1$d conversations? This cannot be undone.
Free, but you\'re sharing your messages with them.
Built-in search of the active provider: %1$s
A quick guide to the features
Require your fingerprint, face, or screen lock to open the app
Set a screen lock (PIN, pattern, fingerprint…) on your device to use this
Not set - the monthly total is always shown in the normal color

The app supports three providers, each with three models (cheapest to most capable):
• OpenAI (ChatGPT)
• Google (Gemini)
• Anthropic (Claude)

Switch the active provider on the main screen or in Settings. The model is chosen per conversation in the chat screen (defaults to the cheapest available).

Each provider needs its own API key, entered in Settings → AI providers.\n\nKeys are encrypted locally (Android Keystore) and never leave the phone except in direct calls to that provider\'s servers — this app has no backend of its own.

Below each AI reply, under the conversation title, and on the main screen you'll see an estimated cost in euros.

It's an approximation based on the provider's pricing and the daily EUR/USD rate — it doesn't account for hosted search fees (billed per query) or cache discounts.

• Set a monthly spending threshold in Settings — the total on the main screen turns red once you cross it.
• The monthly total isn't a separate counter — it's the sum of that calendar month's messages, so it automatically goes back to zero at midnight on the 1st of each month (your phone's local time). There's no manual reset.

In Settings → Context facts you can save information about yourself for the AI to know.

• Global facts are visible in every conversation.
• Per-conversation facts are picked individually from the chat screen.

The AI can ask to perform actions on your phone:
• Add a calendar event
• Set an alarm or timer
• Draft an SMS
• Open navigation
• Save a note

Each one shows a confirmation card first — nothing happens without your approval.

Weather (via Open-Meteo) and web search run automatically in the background when the AI needs them — no confirmation card, nothing to approve.

Choose the search source in Settings → Tools:
• Your provider's own built-in search
• Tavily (needs its own API key)

Not every model supports built-in search; the app falls back to Tavily automatically when it doesn't.

You can attach a photo, a PDF, or a text/CSV file to a message (the paperclip next to the input field).

• Photos are automatically downscaled before sending.
• PDFs are capped at 5 MB.

Every message you send carries the last 20 messages of that conversation, so the AI remembers what was said.\n\nThis also means an attached file or photo is resent with every following message as long as it\'s within those 20 — and counted toward the cost each time.
In Settings you can change the chat font size (Small/Normal/Large/Extra large).

Turn on App lock in Settings to require your fingerprint, face, or your phone's own screen lock (PIN/pattern/password) before the app opens.

• Off by default.
• Re-locks every time the app goes to the background — not just on restart.
• The toggle is greyed out if your phone has no screen lock set up at all.

Your conversation history is included in Android\'s normal automatic backup, so it can come back if you switch phones or reinstall.\n\nYour saved API keys are deliberately excluded from that backup for security — you\'ll need to re-enter them after a restore, but nothing else is lost.

Long-press a conversation tile on the main screen to:
• Rename it
• Delete it (individually or in bulk, via the checkbox mode)
• Pin it

Conversations are sorted by their most recent message, with pinned ones always kept at the top.

Tap the magnifying glass on the main screen to search the text of every conversation at once.

Tapping a result opens that conversation and jumps straight to the matching message.

(This help screen has its own separate search box, at the top of this page.)
Tap the share icon next to Copy on any message to send it elsewhere.\n\nThe share icon in the chat\'s top bar sends the whole conversation as a plain-text transcript.
No facts yet - tap + to add one
No selectable facts - add them in Settings
